title: McCarthy Tétrault Tax Perspectives: May 2026 - Toronto
content:
## McCarthy Tétrault Tax Perspectives: May 2026 - Toronto
Please register now for the second installment of our 2026 Tax Tour, an interactive and practical discussion of the evolving legislative and judicial tax landscape in Canada. Our speakers will cover the following topics:
- New Anti-Hybrid Mismatch Rules - The Second Package
- Recent Cases of Interest
The session will feature the following speakers:
- Stefanie Morand , Partner and National Tax Group Regional Practice Lead - Toronto
- Mike Dolson , Partner, National Tax Group
For questions about this event, please contact clientevents@mccarthy.ca . This program may qualify for CPD credit under the mandatory education regimes for the Law Society of BC and Law Society of Ontario. Further details will be included closer to the date. This seminar may be eligible for CPA CPD credit. More information can be found here . Note: This will take place in our Toronto office and the seminar will be given in English only. A lunch to suit most dietary concerns will be served.
